ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Item number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging (e.g., Each, Box) */,
  "price" REAL /* Original price of the product */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the catalog */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the category was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is the primary category for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is required for the product */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute should be visible to customers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_attributes" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute for the product */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute value is the primary value for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been approved for display */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the customer last logged in */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost */,
  "date_shipped" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "date_delivered" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name at the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the supplier was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the promotion was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_bundles" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product bundle */,
  "bundle_name" TEXT /* Name of the product bundle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product bundle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product bundle */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bundle is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the bundle was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the bundle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the role was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the user permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the permission was added */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personalized_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personalized_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personalized_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
